🖼️ Gallery Manager
✓ Saved

Set the folder path and image filenames for each gallery. Folders are relative to your GitHub repo root. Name your images 1.jpg, 2.jpg etc and upload them to the matching folder in GitHub.

How it works: Upload photos to your GitHub repo in the folder path shown below. Example: if folder is images/driveways then add files at images/driveways/1.jpg, images/driveways/2.jpg etc.
